title: isoloma hirsutum
intro: Isoloma hirsutum is a species of flowering plant in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the hairy net vein fern. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isoloma hirsutum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Isoloma hirsutum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
